entities.name: Harvard Business Review
entities.context: Published research on the hidden penalty of using AI at work, showing employees hide AI use to protect themselves

entities.name: Theory of leverage
entities.context: Framework V is developing to prevent organizational breakdown after personal experience with the pioneer pattern

entities.name: Pioneer pattern
entities.context: Phenomenon where innovators invest discretionary effort but get absorbed without structural change; targets ratchet up, slack vanishes, no reward

entities.name: Stag hunt
entities.context: Game theory metaphor for collective endeavors; pioneers forced to give up on the stag when innovation unrewarded

entities.name: Hare hunting
entities.context: Metaphor for safe individual gains; employees rationally hoard productivity and hide AI use to protect themselves

entities.name: AI
entities.context: Technology employees hide using to protect themselves from ratcheting targets and career penalties

entities.name: Discretionary effort
entities.context: Extra investment pioneers make to learn, create, and share innovations that help everyone

relationships.context: Pioneers give up on the stag when innovation gets absorbed without reward
Employees hide AI use as form of hare hunting—hoarding productivity gains for self-protection
Research validates that leaning in is career-limiting; employees rationally protect themselves
Framework developed in response to experiencing this breakdown pattern
Core element of pioneer behavior that gets exploited rather than rewarded
